local_plugins.note: Local Codex skills are exposed only through plugins. install.* does not write ~/.codex/skills or ~/.agents/skills.

external_cli.gstack: git clone https://github.com/garrytan/gstack ~/.gstack/core && (cd ~/.gstack/core && bun install && bun run build)

note: Store/curated plugins such as superpowers come from the official Codex marketplace. Local wrappers are managed as personal plugins.
